mapper.select: select * from knowledge_category where 1=1 and enabled=#{enabled} order by sort_order asc, id asc
select count(*) from knowledge_doc where category_id=#{id} and deleted=0
mapper.delete: delete from knowledge_doc where category_id=#{id} and deleted=1
mapper.insert: insert into knowledge_category(parent_id, category_code, category_name, sort_order, enabled) values(coalesce(#{parentId}, 0), #{categoryCode}, #{categoryName}, coalesce(#{sortOrder}, 0), coalesce(#{enabled}, 1))
mapper.update: update knowledge_category set parent_id=coalesce(#{parentId}, 0), category_code=#{categoryCode}, category_name=#{categoryName}, sort_order=coalesce(#{sortOrder}, 0), enabled=coalesce(#{enabled}, 1) where id=#{id}
